scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios:release: npm run mobile:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.mobile:android:apk: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.mobile:android:bundle: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
